title: Quote of the day by Socrates' student Plato: "One of the penalties for refusing to participate in politics is…"
summary_full: Plato's ancient warning highlights the consequences of political disengagement.  Choosing not to participate means others will make decisions for you.  Withdrawal does not exempt individuals from the outcomes of governance.  Informed citizens must remain engaged to hold power accountable.  This ensures that capable individuals, not just ambitious ones, shape society.
